DENOMINATOR_DEFINITIONS.old_111: UNIQUE TERMINAL EVENTS (permaticker, last_trade_date) on names whose eligible-formation range touched 2016-2023. NAME-LEVEL PROXIMITY, not exposure.
DENOMINATOR_DEFINITIONS.new_61: UNIQUE TERMINAL EVENTS (permaticker, last_trade_date) where the event date falls inside an ACTUAL lot window (deploy <= last_trade < scheduled_exit) for a name drawn by CORE or >=1 clone.
DENOMINATOR_DEFINITIONS.new_91: FORMATION-PERMATICKER EXPOSURE PAIRS for clones. A DIFFERENT UNIT from the 111/61 event counts: one permaticker can be exposed at several formations.
DENOMINATOR_DEFINITIONS.new_5451: TOTAL CLONE LOT HITS = sum over exposure pairs of distinct clones holding that name at that formation. Counts lots, not events.

set_comparison_ON_UNIQUE_EVENTS_ONLY.valid_because: both sides are (permaticker, last_trade_date) unique-event sets; the 91 and 5451 figures are NOT comparable to these and are excluded from this comparison.

prior_narrative_correction: The 2026-07-16 report placed 111, 61, 91 and 5451 adjacent without stating that 91 and 5451 use different denominators (formation-pairs and lot-hits) than 111/61 (unique events). The set-comparison 111 -> 61 with 50 false positives / 0 false negatives is valid ONLY on unique events.
